purpose: Decision-making agent spawned at run wrap-up; reads retro bundles, result.json files, BACKLOG.md, and ADR listings; applies decisions directly to BACKLOG.md and retro markdown files without user adjudication.

public_api.name: CURATOR_OUTPUT block
public_api.description: JSON block emitted between ---CURATOR_OUTPUT--- markers. Consumed by feature.md Step 6.3 and bug.md Step 4 to verify applied actions.

public_api.name: annotate_retro action
public_api.signature: { action: 'annotate_retro', retro_path: string, finding_anchor: string, disposition: string, reason: string }
public_api.description: New action type. Curator uses Edit tool to append '_Curator: YYYY-MM-DD → <disposition>_' under the finding's '**Suggested change**:' line.

owned_data: BACKLOG.md (findings bullets, rejection archive entries, epics section corrections)
retro markdown files (curator annotation lines only)
dependencies_forbidden: any artifact not listed in owned_data
test_targets: AC-CURATOR-1: Hard Rule 1 permits autonomous file writes
AC-CURATOR-2: Hard Rule 2 establishes curator as sole decision authority
AC-CURATOR-8: frontmatter tools includes Write and Edit
AC-CURATOR-9: output schema uses decisions field
